subject: App Crash Report - Task Manager
body: Hi support team, I am experiencing a critical crash whenever I navigate to the Task Manager screen. Steps to reproduce: 1) Open app 2) Tap on Projects 3) Select any project 4) Tap Task Manager - app immediately crashes. Device: Samsung Galaxy S23, OS: Android 13, App version: 3.0.1. This is blocking my entire workflow. Please fix urgently.

subject: Cannot login after update
body: Hello, ever since I updated to version 3.0.1 I am completely locked out of my account. I enter my credentials and it just shows a white screen indefinitely. I have tried clearing cache and reinstalling. Nothing works. Device: iPhone 14 Pro, iOS 17.5. Please help as I have deadlines today.

subject: Feature Request: Pomodoro Timer
body: Hey there! Love the app. One feature I think would be a great addition is a built-in Pomodoro timer. It would help users like me manage focus sessions directly within the app without needing a separate tool. Would be amazing if it could also log completed pomodoros against specific tasks. Thanks for considering!

subject: Data Loss After Sync Failure
body: This is extremely urgent. After the latest update my tasks stopped syncing between devices and when I force-synced manually it wiped out approximately 2 days of task entries. I need these recovered immediately. I am a premium subscriber and this is completely unacceptable. Device 1: iPad Pro iOS 17, Device 2: iPhone 13 iOS 17. Account: david.kim@company.com

subject: Suggestion - Recurring Task Templates
body: Hi! Long time user here. I wanted to suggest adding recurring task templates. For example I run the same project kickoff checklist every month and currently I have to recreate it manually each time. If we could save task groups as reusable templates it would save me hours every month. Happy to elaborate further if useful.
